title: Eulophia maesta
taxonomy: Eulophia maesta is a member of the orchid family (Orchidaceae) and is classified as a species within the genus Eulophia. It belongs to the subfamily Epidendroideae and is a type of terrestrial orchid. Eulophia maesta is native to tropical regions and is often found in shaded areas with high humidity. The species is characterized by its distinctive flowers and leaves, which play a crucial role in its identification. Through its classification, Eulophia maesta is grouped together with other Eulophia species, which share similar characteristics and growth habits.

intro: Eulophia maesta, also known as the majestic eulophia, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa, characterized by its showy and fragrant flowers. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues and skin infections.
